Subject: Confirmation of Email for QAQC Audit of Unigaz Office  

Dear [Recipient's Name],  

Regarding the upcoming QAQC Audit of the Unigaz Office, conducted by BGC and AEB consultants on 31 October 2022, as per the provided mail and Ashghal instruction, it is mandatory for you to proceed with the work for this project.  

Please confirm your availability to receive the necessary communication and arrange an appropriate email address for the audit process.  

Kindly prepare a response to confirm your participation.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Contact Information]
